metadata.title: 4o Image - AI Image Generator & Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: 4o Image (GPT-Image-1) by OpenAI. Latest AI image generation model understanding both text and visual context with remarkable accuracy. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

hero.title: 4o Image
hero.description: OpenAI's latest AI image generation model. Understands both text and visual context, creating and editing images with remarkable accuracy and consistent styles.

introduce.title: About 4o Image
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: The GPT-Image-1 model, also known as ChatGPT 4o Image, is OpenAI's latest AI image generation model that understands both text and visual context for remarkable accuracy.

items.title: Multimodal Understanding
items.description: Understands both text and visual context, enabling precise image generation and editing.

items.title: Instruction Precision
items.description: Follows instructions precisely unlike traditional diffusion models for accurate results.

items.title: Consistent Styles
items.description: Supports consistent styles across multiple generations for cohesive visual projects.

items.title: Legible Text
items.description: Renders legible text within images, ideal for design and marketing applications.

items.description: Superior comprehension of complex visual and textual relationships.

items.title: High Accuracy
items.description: Remarkable accuracy in following detailed instructions and maintaining visual coherence.

items.title: Fast Generation

items.title: Commercial License

items.title: What is 4o Image?
items.description: 4o Image (GPT-Image-1) is OpenAI's latest AI image generation model that understands both text and visual context for remarkable accuracy in image creation and editing.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: 4o Image supports both Text To Image (generating images from text descriptions) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: How is it different from diffusion models?
items.description: Unlike traditional diffusion models, 4o Image follows instructions precisely, supports consistent styles, and renders legible text.

items.title: Is it good for text in images?
items.description: Yes! 4o Image excels at rendering legible text within images, making it ideal for design and marketing applications.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with 4o Image through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What makes it ideal for automation?
items.description: 4o Image's precise instruction following and style consistency make it perfect for creative automation workflows.

cta.title: Ready to Try 4o Image?
cta.description: Experience OpenAI's latest image generation model. Create precise visuals with remarkable accuracy.
